query:
UPDATE atolls SET
  overview = CASE
    WHEN name = 'Alif Alif Atoll' THEN 'Alif Alif Atoll, located in the North Region, is a pristine destination known for its exclusive resorts and world-class diving. The atoll features some of the Maldives\' most luxurious properties and offers an ideal balance between relaxation and adventure. With its crystal-clear waters and abundant marine life, Alif Alif is perfect for both experienced divers and those seeking a peaceful retreat.'
    WHEN name = 'Baa Atoll' THEN 'Baa Atoll is a UNESCO Biosphere Reserve renowned for its amazingly rich marine life and stunning coral reefs. The atoll is home to Hanifaru Bay, a protected marine area that attracts hundreds of manta rays and whale sharks annually. Witness these majestic creatures at the world\'s largest natural manta ray feeding station. The atoll offers a unique blend of luxury resorts and authentic local island experiences.'
    WHEN name = 'Kaafu Atoll' THEN 'Kaafu Atoll is the most developed and accessible atoll in the Maldives, home to the capital Malé and the international airport. Despite its development, the atoll maintains pristine natural beauty with excellent diving and snorkeling opportunities. The atoll offers a perfect blend of convenience, luxury resorts, and authentic local experiences. It\'s an ideal destination for first-time visitors and those seeking easy access to multiple attractions.'
    WHEN name = 'Vaavu Atoll' THEN 'Vaavu Atoll is an exclusive and less-visited destination perfect for divers seeking pristine conditions and fewer crowds. Known for its dramatic underwater topography and strong currents, Vaavu offers some of the Maldives\' most exhilarating diving experiences. The atoll features world-class channel dives and is home to several luxury resorts catering to diving enthusiasts and adventure seekers.'
    WHEN name = 'Meemu Atoll' THEN 'Meemu Atoll is a hidden gem offering authentic Maldivian experiences with a perfect balance of luxury and local culture. The atoll features pristine dive sites, beautiful beaches, and a mix of luxury resorts and local guesthouses. Known for its friendly atmosphere and excellent value for money, Meemu is ideal for travelers seeking genuine experiences without excessive crowds or premium pricing.'
    ELSE overview
  END,
  highlights = CASE
    WHEN name = 'Alif Alif Atoll' THEN '[{"title":"Luxury Resorts","description":"Home to some of the Maldives\' most exclusive and upscale resort properties"},{"title":"World-Class Diving","description":"Exceptional dive sites with pristine coral reefs and abundant marine life"},{"title":"Pristine Beaches","description":"Untouched white sand beaches with crystal-clear turquoise waters"},{"title":"Water Sports","description":"Excellent opportunities for snorkeling, windsurfing, and jet skiing"}]'
    WHEN name = 'Baa Atoll' THEN '[{"title":"Hanifaru Bay","description":"UNESCO Biosphere Reserve with seasonal manta ray and whale shark aggregations"},{"title":"Manta Ray Encounters","description":"World\'s largest natural manta ray feeding station (June-November)"},{"title":"Pristine Coral Reefs","description":"Healthy coral ecosystems with exceptional biodiversity"},{"title":"Local Islands","description":"Authentic Maldivian culture and traditional island life"}]'
    WHEN name = 'Kaafu Atoll' THEN '[{"title":"Easy Access","description":"Closest atoll to Malé International Airport with shortest transfer times"},{"title":"Diverse Resorts","description":"Wide range of luxury and mid-range resort options"},{"title":"Excellent Diving","description":"Numerous dive sites suitable for all skill levels"},{"title":"Local Culture","description":"Easy access to local islands and authentic Maldivian experiences"}]'
    WHEN name = 'Vaavu Atoll' THEN '[{"title":"Premium Diving","description":"Exclusive dive sites with minimal crowds and pristine conditions"},{"title":"Channel Dives","description":"Thrilling drift dives through powerful channels with abundant marine life"},{"title":"Luxury Resorts","description":"Exclusive properties catering to diving enthusiasts"},{"title":"Pristine Environment","description":"Less-visited atoll with untouched natural beauty"}]'
    WHEN name = 'Meemu Atoll' THEN '[{"title":"Authentic Experiences","description":"Balance of luxury resorts and local island culture"},{"title":"Excellent Value","description":"High-quality experiences at reasonable prices"},{"title":"Pristine Diving","description":"Excellent dive sites with diverse marine life"},{"title":"Local Hospitality","description":"Warm welcome from friendly local communities"}]'
    ELSE highlights
  END,
  activities = CASE
    WHEN name = 'Alif Alif Atoll' THEN '[{"title":"Diving","description":"Explore world-class dive sites with diverse marine ecosystems","emoji":"🤿"},{"title":"Snorkeling","description":"Discover colorful coral reefs and tropical fish in shallow waters","emoji":"🏊"},{"title":"Spa & Wellness","description":"Indulge in luxury spa treatments and wellness programs","emoji":"🧘"},{"title":"Water Sports","description":"Enjoy windsurfing, jet skiing, and other water activities","emoji":"🏄"},{"title":"Island Hopping","description":"Visit nearby islands and experience local culture","emoji":"⛵"}]'
    WHEN name = 'Baa Atoll' THEN '[{"title":"Manta Ray Snorkeling","description":"Swim with hundreds of manta rays at Hanifaru Bay (seasonal)","emoji":"🦑"},{"title":"Whale Shark Encounters","description":"Spot gentle whale sharks in their natural habitat","emoji":"🐋"},{"title":"Diving","description":"Explore pristine dive sites with healthy coral reefs","emoji":"🤿"},{"title":"Local Culture","description":"Visit inhabited islands and experience authentic Maldivian life","emoji":"🏝️"},{"title":"Photography","description":"Capture stunning marine life and landscape photography","emoji":"📸"}]'
    WHEN name = 'Kaafu Atoll' THEN '[{"title":"Diving","description":"Explore diverse dive sites from beginner to advanced","emoji":"🤿"},{"title":"Snorkeling","description":"Discover coral reefs and marine life from the beach","emoji":"🏊"},{"title":"Island Hopping","description":"Visit multiple islands in one day","emoji":"⛵"},{"title":"Water Sports","description":"Enjoy various water activities and beach sports","emoji":"🏄"},{"title":"Spa & Wellness","description":"Relax with spa treatments and wellness activities","emoji":"🧘"}]'
    WHEN name = 'Vaavu Atoll' THEN '[{"title":"Advanced Diving","description":"Challenging dive sites for experienced divers","emoji":"🤿"},{"title":"Channel Dives","description":"Exhilarating drift dives through ocean channels","emoji":"⚡"},{"title":"Snorkeling","description":"Explore coral reefs and marine life","emoji":"🏊"},{"title":"Relaxation","description":"Enjoy peaceful island atmosphere and pristine beaches","emoji":"🏝️"},{"title":"Photography","description":"Capture stunning underwater and landscape photography","emoji":"📸"}]'
    WHEN name = 'Meemu Atoll' THEN '[{"title":"Diving","description":"Explore diverse dive sites with healthy coral reefs","emoji":"🤿"},{"title":"Snorkeling","description":"Discover marine life in shallow waters","emoji":"🏊"},{"title":"Local Culture","description":"Experience authentic Maldivian island life","emoji":"🏝️"},{"title":"Fishing","description":"Try traditional Maldivian fishing methods","emoji":"🎣"},{"title":"Beach Activities","description":"Relax on pristine beaches and enjoy water sports","emoji":"🏖️"}]'
    ELSE activities
  END,
  accommodation = CASE
    WHEN name = 'Alif Alif Atoll' THEN '[{"type":"Luxury Resorts","description":"World-class resorts with overwater bungalows and private beaches","priceRange":"$800-$3000+ per night"},{"type":"Boutique Resorts","description":"Intimate properties with personalized service and unique experiences","priceRange":"$400-$1200 per night"},{"type":"Island Resorts","description":"All-inclusive resorts with comprehensive amenities and activities","priceRange":"$500-$2000 per night"}]'
    WHEN name = 'Baa Atoll' THEN '[{"type":"Luxury Resorts","description":"Premium resorts with overwater villas and world-class amenities","priceRange":"$600-$2500 per night"},{"type":"Mid-Range Resorts","description":"Comfortable resorts with good facilities and service","priceRange":"$300-$800 per night"},{"type":"Local Guesthouses","description":"Budget-friendly accommodation on inhabited islands","priceRange":"$50-$200 per night"}]'
    WHEN name = 'Kaafu Atoll' THEN '[{"type":"Luxury Resorts","description":"Premium properties with exceptional service and amenities","priceRange":"$700-$3000 per night"},{"type":"Mid-Range Resorts","description":"Comfortable and affordable resort options","priceRange":"$250-$800 per night"},{"type":"Budget Resorts","description":"Economy-friendly resorts with basic amenities","priceRange":"$100-$300 per night"},{"type":"Local Guesthouses","description":"Authentic accommodation on inhabited islands","priceRange":"$40-$150 per night"}]'
    WHEN name = 'Vaavu Atoll' THEN '[{"type":"Luxury Dive Resorts","description":"Exclusive resorts designed for diving enthusiasts with dive packages included","priceRange":"$800-$2500 per night"},{"type":"Premium Resorts","description":"High-end properties with excellent diving facilities","priceRange":"$600-$1800 per night"}]'
    WHEN name = 'Meemu Atoll' THEN '[{"type":"Luxury Resorts","description":"Premium properties with excellent amenities and service","priceRange":"$500-$1500 per night"},{"type":"Mid-Range Resorts","description":"Comfortable resorts with good facilities","priceRange":"$250-$700 per night"},{"type":"Local Guesthouses","description":"Budget-friendly authentic accommodation","priceRange":"$50-$200 per night"}]'
    ELSE accommodation
  END,
  transportation = CASE
    WHEN name = 'Alif Alif Atoll' THEN '30-45 minutes by speedboat from Malé International Airport'
    WHEN name = 'Baa Atoll' THEN '45-60 minutes by speedboat or 20 minutes by seaplane from Malé'
    WHEN name = 'Kaafu Atoll' THEN '5-30 minutes by speedboat from Malé International Airport (shortest transfer in Maldives)'
    WHEN name = 'Vaavu Atoll' THEN '60-90 minutes by speedboat from Malé International Airport'
    WHEN name = 'Meemu Atoll' THEN '90-120 minutes by speedboat from Malé International Airport'
    ELSE transportation
  END,
  bestSeason = CASE
    WHEN name = 'Alif Alif Atoll' THEN 'November to April (dry season) for best weather and diving conditions'
    WHEN name = 'Baa Atoll' THEN 'June to November for manta rays; December to May for whale sharks and general diving'
    WHEN name = 'Kaafu Atoll' THEN 'Year-round destination with best weather November to April'
    WHEN name = 'Vaavu Atoll' THEN 'January to April for best diving conditions; June to November for manta rays'
    WHEN name = 'Meemu Atoll' THEN 'November to April for best weather and diving conditions'
    ELSE bestSeason
  END
WHERE name IN ('Alif Alif Atoll', 'Baa Atoll', 'Kaafu Atoll', 'Vaavu Atoll', 'Meemu Atoll');
